## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Component

Which part of PIKKY is affected?

- [ ] Solana Program (on-chain)
- [ ] TypeScript SDK
- [ ] Python Agent / Trading Engine
- [ ] x402 Payment Flow
- [ ] MBTI Strategy Logic
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

1. Go to '...'
2. Execute '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

Paste any error messages, logs, or stack traces here.

## Checklist
